title: The Understudy WIP
description: Work-in-progress build of The Understudy, a new playable character for Slay the Spire 2. Shared for friend testing. Requires BaseLib.
changeNote: v1.10.3 - Rarity rebalance: Common cards are now all simple (<=2 effects); the 3-effect attacks (Buy Time, Joke, etc.) moved to Uncommon, and simpler cards (Take Two, Drawing Blanks, Must Go On, Stage Fright, etc.) moved to Common. Requires BaseLib.
